message:
fix(core): harden vendored mux observability — missing summary as blind error, stream_exit_rx mutability, tailer cfg gate cleanup

runtime.rs: Extract record_pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_result()
helper.  Ok(None) from pane_tiered_scrollback_summary is now treated
as a blind error (logged + recorded in error_samples) instead of
being silently ignored.  Fix stream_exit_rx mutability for
asupersync-runtime feature gate.  Test for missing-summary-as-blind.
Formatting fix in partial test.

tailer.rs: Wrap non-vendored fallback in #[cfg(not(feature = "vendored"))]
block instead of relying on unreachable code after early return.

vendored.rs: Update recommendation strings from wa -> ft (continued
rename cleanup).

wezterm.rs: Additional vendored mux error reporting improvements
for tiered scrollback paths.

vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs: Expanded behavioral test
coverage for vendored async contract paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,9 @@ fn compatibility_report_with(
             local_commit,
             vendored_commit,
             vendored_version,
-            message: "local WezTerm version unavailable; refusing vendored backend compatibility probe".to_string(),
+            message:
+                "local WezTerm version unavailable; refusing vendored backend compatibility probe"
+                    .to_string(),
             recommendation: Some(
                 "Install WezTerm or ensure the wezterm binary is on PATH".to_string(),
             ),
